mapper.select: SELECT TBU.ID, TBU.USER_EMAIL, TBU.USER_PASSWORD, TBU.USER_PROFILE, TBU.USER_NAME, TBU.USER_CREATE_AT, TBU.USER_NICKNAME, TBU.USER_ROLE, TBU.USER_BIRTH, TBU.USER_INTRO, TBU.USER_JOB, VUA.POST_COUNT, VUA.POST_LIKE_COUNT, VUA.COMMENT_COUNT, VUA.GET_LIKE_COUNT FROM TBL_USER TBU JOIN VW_USER_ACTIVITY VUA ON TBU.ID = VUA.USER_ID WHERE ID = #{id}
